materialChanges: Corrected the greenhouse mastery key, summary, reasoning, acceptable response, common-error feedback, and rubric so the supplied within-system replicates support repeatability, Laboratory B's reference results support an approximately +8% systematic component, and cross-system reproducibility remains unjudged without a same-object comparison.
Reclassified the one-week observer recode as weak consistency across occasions rather than repeatability because the time condition deliberately changed.
Corrected the NIST IR 7959 issued year from 2014-05-19 to 2013, keeping the report distinct from later publication activity.
Aligned the lesson title in ATTRIBUTION.md with the authoritative lesson.json title while preserving lesson identity, version, status, and source-confidence state.

reviewDispositions.rationale: The greenhouse answer now classifies each laboratory's supplied repetitions as condition-specific repeatability, identifies Laboratory B's approximately +8% systematic component, expressly says cross-system reproducibility cannot be judged without a same-object comparison, and carries that correction through the summary, reasoning, acceptable response, common errors, and rubric.
The one-week recode is now described as weak consistency across occasions and explicitly excluded from repeatability because the time condition changed.
references.json now records the NIST IR 7959 issued year as 2013, consistent with the reviewer's check of the official report record.

This note confirms the remaining arithmetic, conceptual boundaries, and source-note mapping; the finalizer independently rechecked the displayed means, ranges, offsets, 8% discrepancy, 14-point total, mastery thresholds, and claim/source links and found no correction to make.
The greenhouse key and rubric now distinguish within-system repeatability from the unavailable cross-system reproducibility comparison and no longer reward the unsupported inference.
The feedback now identifies weak consistency across the one-week occasion change and explains why that evidence falls outside the lesson's short-interval repeatability conditions.
This is a positive note on the opening, worked reasoning, practice progression, fading support, and feedback; those effective elements were preserved in the coherent final revision.

evidenceChecked: All six scene files retain one level-one heading and a coherent source/reading order defined by lesson.json; headings, prose, lists, and tables carry the instructional sequence without layout-dependent directions.
The measurement-audit diagram has concise alt text, a relationship-complete long description, inert local diagram JSON, and an equivalent ordered prose checklist in the same scene.
Every quantitative table is readable as labelled rows and columns, and the relevant means, ranges, discrepancies, directions, and interpretation are restated in prose after the learner attempt.

Prompts do not depend on color, position, sound, motion, hover, dragging, speed, or a physical procedure; assessment is untimed and retakeable, and responses may be typed, dictated with learner-controlled assistive technology, or organized as prose, headings, or a table.

The revised answer and feedback preserve the same scientific judgment across textual response routes, provide retry contexts, and retain explicit recovery guidance for error, condition, calibration, operation, and construct-validity misconceptions.

lesson.json declares no third-party assets; the diagram, fictional data, examples, assessment, feedback, and glossary are identified in ATTRIBUTION.md as original CC BY 4.0 material, with no quotations, redistributed media, or datasets.

All four references record facts-only factual-reference use, concrete original-expression boundaries, dated checked-no-agent-restriction-found access states, terms routes, source scope, and learner-visible claim links; no source is marked human-only.

Every mapped material claim resolves to a complete reference ID and appears in a same-scene source note with all supporting sources; claims retain pending-review status for the maintainer's permitted post-finalization transition.

The pack contains no raw HTML, JavaScript, remote embeds, Markdown images, active SVG, executable notebook, unsafe data URL, personal or patient data, secrets, or real learner records; clinical, privacy, credential, and physical-procedure boundaries are explicit.
ATTRIBUTION.md and lesson.json disclose the accountable principal and material authoring-agent provenance; this adjudication discloses the fresh finalizer run and instruction digest.
limitations: This was a source-level audit; no rendered screen-reader, keyboard-only browser, 200% reflow, contrast, print, or unavailable non-web export test was run.

The finalizer inspected the source-access and rights ledger but did not independently revisit external source terms or compare the lesson line by line with source expression; the dated ledger checks and academic review remain accountable attestations rather than legal verification.

Per the operator's scope, site schemas were not read and npm, strict source preflight, repository validation, and GitHub readiness checks were not run; local checks covered JSON parsing, internal IDs and links, source-note coverage, scene headings, assessment/rubric totals, diagram endpoints, active-content patterns, reuse declarations, and review metadata only.
Equivalent non-dismissed COMMENTED GitHub transports were supplied as operator context but were not independently inspected in this run.

rationale: The local record contains the two required standard-lesson advisory inputs: one academic and one learning-design request-changes review, with distinct declared runs, providers, and model families and one disclosed accountable principal. Both overlapping major objections were correct and are fully resolved in the single final revision; the academic date correction was also incorporated, and both positive note findings required no change. The resulting pack preserves its strong first-read opening, worked reasoning, fading practice, retrieval, transfer, feedback, recovery, source mapping, and boundaries. The finalizer's source-level accessibility-and-rights audit found no unresolved content, access, privacy, security, attribution, or reuse blocker. The quorum snapshot relies on disclosed and attested provenance and the operator-supplied COMMENTED transport state, not verified human or provider independence. Subject to the recorded procedural conditions and limitations, the evidence supports merge.
dissent: Both eligible advisory reviews returned request-changes rather than approval; their substantive objections are preserved here and were incorporated before the merge decision.
Both review runs disclose that github:VSBDev operated authoring and review agents, so the record is role-isolated founding-stage agent review rather than independent human peer review.

The learning-design review's final limitation still names commit 150ac2da6ead05828d888bd9def5e1393cd2566e even though its candidateCommit field names the required original candidate. The teaching files at that SHA are byte-identical to candidate 65b8835cd2a2cd20f12a3946fb8367b649967382; the inconsistency is treated as a preserved clerical limitation, not concealed.
conditions: After committing this final content revision with both frozen reviews and before merge, replace PENDING-FINAL-COMMIT with the exact 40-character final content SHA; make no further teaching-content change after that SHA.
Replace each RUNTIME-STAMPED adjudicator agent field from the runtime banner without changing the run ID or material-instructions digest.

Run the repository's required strict source preflight, schema/lesson validation, sequential verification, and pull-request provenance/readiness checks; resolve only procedural or permitted publication-state issues, and do not merge if any substantive defect appears.
The maintainer may make only the authorized post-finalization publication transition for lesson status, source confidence, and retained claim review-status fields.

adjudicator.displayName: VSBDev operating the fresh finalizer and adjudicator
